Frequently asked questions

Everything you need to know about numerology, our tools, and how Numerastra works.

All Numerology basics The numbers Using Numerastra Billing & account Philosophy

Numerology basics

What is numerology?+
Numerology is the metaphysical study of numbers and their influence on human life. It assigns meaning to numbers derived from your name and date of birth to reveal personality traits, life purpose, relationship dynamics, and timing for important decisions. Three major systems exist: Pythagorean (Greek, 6th century BC), Chaldean (Babylonian, far older), and Vedic Ankashastra (Indian, linked to the Navagraha planetary system).
How is a life path number calculated?+
Reduce the day, month, and year of your birth to single digits (preserving master numbers 11, 22, 33), then sum them and reduce again.

Example for March 15, 1992:
• Month: 3
• Day: 1+5 = 6
• Year: 1+9+9+2 = 21 → 2+1 = 3
• Sum: 3+6+3 = 12 → 1+2 = 3

Life path = 3 (The Creator). Try our free calculator for instant results.
What's the difference between Pythagorean, Chaldean, and Vedic systems?+
Pythagorean assigns numbers to letters alphabetically (A=1, B=2, C=3...). Western standard.

Chaldean assigns numbers by sound vibration (A=1, F=8, O=7) and never uses 9 in name calculations because it's considered sacred. Older system, considered more accurate by serious practitioners.

Vedic Ankashastra uses moolank (root number from birth day), bhagyank (destiny from full date), and namank (name vibration), connecting each number to a planetary ruler in the Navagraha system.
Why do you use three systems instead of one?+
Each system illuminates a different facet of you. Pythagorean is precise on personality and life path. Chaldean is more accurate for name vibrations. Vedic ties everything to planetary energies and remedies. When all three agree, your reading carries very high confidence — that's the synthesis number we display first. When they differ, you're a multi-faceted person and each system gives a unique angle worth exploring.

The numbers

What are master numbers (11, 22, 33)?+
Master numbers carry heightened spiritual potential and should never be reduced.

11 — The Illuminator: Visionary intuition, spiritual insight, often artistic. Challenge: nervous tension.
22 — The Master Builder: Turns visions into lasting reality. The architect of large systems. Challenge: pressure, burnout.
33 — The Master Teacher: Divine compassion, healing, selfless service. Rare. Challenge: emotional burden.

If your life path reduces to 11, 22, or 33, you carry both the master number's gift and its underlying single digit (2, 4, or 6).
What are karmic numbers (13, 14, 16, 19)?+
Karmic numbers appear in your numerology before reduction and indicate lessons carried from past lives or unresolved issues to address now.

13: Transformation through hard work — laziness from a past life.
14: Freedom through discipline — abuse of freedom.
16: Ego dissolution — pride and arrogance to release.
19: Independence and self-sufficiency — abuse of power.

Karmic numbers aren't curses — they're invitations to grow.
What's the difference between life path and destiny number?+
Life path comes from your birth date and represents your soul's natural inclination — the path you're walking.

Destiny (or expression number) comes from your full birth name and represents what you're meant to become — your potential.

They work together: life path is the path, destiny is the destination. When they harmonise, you feel aligned. When they conflict, you feel pulled in two directions — and that tension itself is meaningful information.
What is a soul urge number?+
Calculated from the vowels in your full birth name. Represents your innermost desires — what truly motivates you, often beneath what you show the world. Soul urge 1 craves leadership; soul urge 6 craves to nurture; soul urge 7 craves wisdom.
What is a personality number?+
Calculated from the consonants in your full birth name. Represents how others perceive you — the version of yourself you project. The gap between your soul urge (inner) and personality (outer) is often where personal work lies.

Using Numerastra

Is the free reading really free?+
Yes — completely free, forever, no credit card required. You get the full synthesis reading, all four numerology systems, Lo Shu grid, biorhythm, angel number lookup, personal year forecast, and 2 lifetime AI questions. The free tier alone is more comprehensive than most paid apps.
How accurate are the AI guidance answers?+
Our AI uses Claude (by Anthropic) trained with deep numerological context built from your specific profile. It references your actual numbers — life path, expression, soul urge, planetary ruler, current personal year — and gives personalised answers tied to those numbers. It is not generic horoscope text. Pro users get unlimited questions; free users get 2 lifetime questions.
Can I save multiple profiles (family members)?+
Free plan: 1 saved profile. Pro plan: 10 saved profiles. Useful for tracking compatibility across family, partner, business co-founders. Each profile gets full readings independently.
Do you have a mobile app?+
Web works perfectly on mobile (it's a Progressive Web App — add to home screen for native feel). Dedicated iOS and Android apps launching mid-2026 — Pro users get early access.
Is my data private?+
Yes. We never sell your data. Names and birth dates are encrypted at rest. Your readings are private to you. We use mobile OTP for account authentication — no passwords to leak. Read our full privacy policy.

Billing & account

What payment methods do you accept?+
India: Credit cards, debit cards, UPI, net banking, and wallets via Razorpay.
International: Cards in 135+ currencies via Stripe.

All transactions are PCI-compliant. We never store your card details.
Can I cancel my subscription anytime?+
Yes. One click in account settings, no questions, no retention calls. You retain Pro access until the end of your current billing period.
Is there a refund policy?+
7-day no-questions-asked refund on Pro Monthly and Pro Annual subscriptions. Basic Report (one-time ₹249 purchase) is non-refundable once the PDF is generated, since the work is delivered.
Can I upgrade or downgrade later?+
Yes. Upgrade Basic → Pro anytime — we credit the unused portion of your Basic report. Downgrade Pro → Free at end of billing period (you keep Pro features until then). Switch Pro Monthly → Pro Annual to save ₹889/year.
How do I delete my account?+
Account settings → Delete account. All your data (profile, readings, AI conversations) is permanently deleted within 30 days. We retain transaction records for 7 years per legal requirements (no personal data — just amounts and timestamps).

Philosophy

Is numerology scientifically proven?+
No, and we don't claim it is. Numerology is a metaphysical practice with thousands of years of tradition across multiple cultures. It's not science in the laboratory sense, but many people find genuine value in its insights — not as fortune telling, but as a framework for self-reflection, self-understanding, and decision-making. We present numerology as a wisdom tradition, not as proven fact.
Should I make life decisions based on my numerology?+
Use it as one input among many. Numerology can illuminate your tendencies, suggest favourable timings, and reveal patterns — but you are the one making decisions. Don't replace medical, legal, or financial professional advice with numerology. Treat it like a thoughtful friend offering perspective, not an oracle dispensing commands.
Why do different sources give different meanings for the same number?+
Numerology has many traditions — Western Pythagorean, Chaldean, Vedic Ankashastra, Cheiro's compound numbers, Lo Shu, and modern interpretations. Each carries its own framework. Numerastra uses authentic source-derived meanings (Cheiro for compounds, classical Vedic texts for moolank meanings, Pythagorean tradition for life path) and shows you when systems agree (high confidence) and when they differ (multi-faceted reading).
